upasargachandrika.example_text: 'utkftyotkftya mAMsAni tulayA samatolayat' (BA॰anu॰32.24) sam-Sabda iha DAtunA sAhacaryameva prayogezu darSayati nArTAntaraM kimapi dyotayati
